body:
Python package versioning SHALL follow a hybrid model.

- `ssot-contracts`, `ssot-views`, `ssot-codegen`, `ssot-core`, and `ssot-registry` SHALL remain in lockstep.
- `ssot-cli` and `ssot-tui` SHALL version independently.
- Surface packages SHALL depend on compatible released `ssot-core` and `ssot-contracts` ranges rather than exact lockstep versions.
- The umbrella `ssot-registry` package SHALL remain the published bundle that composes the canonical runtime and primary CLI distributions.
summary: Python package versioning SHALL follow a hybrid model.
title: Hybrid package versioning policy
